nodes.name: Cron: Jan 1 00:01 PHT
nodes.notes: Runs once per year on January 1 at 00:01 PHT (UTC+8 = Dec 31 16:01 UTC). Handles annual UPIS depreciation.

nodes.name: Check dry-run mode
nodes.notes: UPIS_DRY_RUN=true: skips all DB writes and CAS POSTs, logs only.

parameters.query:
SELECT i.item_id, i.item_name,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ia.attribute_name = 'depreciation_rate'         THEN ia.attribute_value END) AS depreciation_rate,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ia.attribute_name = 'accumulated_depreciation'  THEN ia.attribute_value END) AS accumulated_depreciation,
       (
         SELECT sm.unit_cost::numeric
         FROM   stock_movements sm
         WHERE  sm.item_id = i.item_id
           AND  sm.movement_type = 'receive'
         ORDER  BY sm.moved_at ASC
         LIMIT  1
       ) AS acquisition_cost
FROM   items i
JOIN   item_attributes ia ON ia.item_id = i.item_id
WHERE  i.category_code    = 'UPIS'
  AND  i.lifecycle_status != 'disposed'
  AND  ia.attribute_name IN ('depreciation_rate', 'accumulated_depreciation')
GROUP  BY i.item_id, i.item_name

nodes.name: Fetch UPIS items
nodes.notes: Returns all non-disposed UPIS items with depreciation_rate and current accumulated_depreciation.

nodes.name: Calculate depreciation
nodes.notes: Computes annual_depreciation = acquisition_cost × (rate / 100). Skips items with zero cost or rate.

nodes.name: Not dry-run?
nodes.notes: In dry-run mode: skip DB write and CAS POST, proceed to dry-run log only.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO item_attributes (item_id, attribute_name, attribute_value)
VALUES ('{{ $json.item_id }}'::uuid, 'accumulated_depreciation', '{{ $json.new_accumulated }}')
ON CONFLICT (item_id, attribute_name)
DO UPDATE SET attribute_value = EXCLUDED.attribute_value, updated_at = now()

nodes.name: POST CAS2000 depreciation journal
nodes.notes: Posts Dr 5310 / Cr 1990 journal for this UPIS item.

nodes.name: Log: dry-run result
nodes.notes: Dry-run: logs computed values without writing to DB or CAS2000.
